response.justification: Candidate brings 20+ years of polyglot full-stack experience with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, plus solid TypeScript/Node.js depth and platform-building chops via GISCollective. However, the resume lacks concrete evidence of production GenAI delivery at scale, RAG/vector database work, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), or major cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) architecture beyond a brief AWS CDK mention. Customer-facing forward-deployed delivery experience is also not demonstrated, so a screening call is warranted to probe depth on GenAI systems, cloud, and stakeholder-facing work.
strengths: Deep full-stack engineering background with TypeScript/Node.js and polyglot adaptability
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong engineering-excellence signals: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, mentoring, OSS platform ownership
concerns: No demonstrated production RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability work
Limited evidence of major cloud platform architecture (AWS/GCP/Azure) at staff scale
No clear customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed delivery experience

key_factors.factor: Missing concrete GenAI/RAG/vector DB production experience
MCP and agentic tooling exposure at re:cinq
Unclear cloud-platform and customer-facing delivery depth
